message:
feat(daemon): expand JSONL backup to all core tables (hq-u6t)

Now exports comments, config, dependencies, events, labels, and metadata
in addition to issues. Each database gets a subdirectory ({db}/issues.jsonl,
{db}/dependencies.jsonl, etc). Wisp tables still excluded (Reaper handles).
Legacy flat {db}.jsonl maintained for backward compat.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
